items.titolo: OpenAI aggiorna GPT-5.5-Cyber e lancia Patch the Planet
items.descrizione: Insieme alle versioni aggiornate di GPT-5-5-Cyber e del plugin di Codex Security, OpenAI ha lanciato Patch the Planet per i progetti open source. The post OpenAI aggiorna GPT-5.5-Cyber e lancia Patch the Planet appeared

items.titolo: How to troubleshoot your PC problems with Copilot or ChatGPT - effectively
items.descrizione: I got tired of frustrating, error-filled troubleshooting sessions with AI chatbots, so I asked Copilot for help. Here's what I learned about better prompting.

items.titolo: Gmail's genius Gemini Flows feature fixes filters - but only for your first 2000 emails a month
items.descrizione: I tried Gmail's new Gemini Flows feature and it's a huge filter improvement with one big catch for power users.

items.titolo: Anthropic’s powerful Mythos AI reportedly breached ‘almost all’ NSA classified systems within a few hours during red-team test — report sheds more light on the U.S. government's sudden ban on the flagship models
items.descrizione: Anthropic’s Mythos AI reportedly breached nearly all NSA classified systems during a controlled red-team test, according to a quote cited by The Economist. The report adds context to the U.S. government’s sudden restrict
